name: python3-docopt
title: python3-docopt
description:
command-line interface description language (Python3)
docopt helps you define an interface for your command-line app and
automatically generate a parser for it. Its interface descriptions are
based on a formalization of the standard conventions used in help
messages and man pages.
.
This is the Python 3 compatible version of the package.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-docopt because command-line interface description language (Python3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-docopt as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-docopt with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-docopt --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
